projects.title: Himira (ONDC E-Commerce Platform)
projects.bodyText: Built scalable Node.js microservices integrated with ONDC (Beckn Protocol) for a government-backed e-commerce platform supporting both buyer and seller applications. Designed an event-driven pipeline using Google Pub/Sub and Golang workers, synchronizing data across MongoDB and PostgreSQL with Grafana monitoring for observability.

projects.title: Plan It (Real-Time Task Management Platform)
projects.bodyText: Developed a Jira-like task management platform with real-time collaboration using WebSockets. Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC). Optimized MongoDB aggregation queries with Mongoose, reducing average response time by 25%.

projects.title: JeetaBet (iGaming Platform)
projects.bodyText: Engineered backend services for a high-scale iGaming platform offering sportsbook and casino features. Built real-time betting workflows and event-driven systems to handle live odds, user interactions, and payments. Improved system scalability and reliability under high concurrent traffic using caching and asynchronous processing.

projects.title: Training & Placement Cell Portal
projects.bodyText: Developed and optimized a web portal for managing student placements, queries, and company drives. Improved performance by optimizing MySQL queries and building reusable React components for better scalability.

projects.title: Guess The Number Game
projects.bodyText: Built an interactive number guessing game using vanilla JavaScript with DOM manipulation. Implemented dynamic UI updates using querySelector, real-time user feedback, and game state management with responsive styling using CSS.

projects.title: Packing List App
projects.bodyText: Developed a responsive packing list application using ReactJS to manage travel items efficiently. Implemented dynamic state management, list operations (add/remove/update), and interactive UI components to enhance user experience and organization.
